MASTER CALENDAR SHORT CAUSE
Off Calendar Aug-16-2010 Dismissal - No Appearance

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Mar-22-2010 Set For Trial On Aug-16-10 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

Notice Of Motion For Issue, Evidence, Terminating, And Monetary Sanctions Against Pltf New On Sang, Llc For Its Failure To Comply With Discovery Orders
Off Calendar Mar-25-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearance:
Michael Lee, Esq., for defendant and moving party: TIAN HU
Suzanne H. Lee, owner of Gourmet Sales, LLC. in Propria Persona
After hearing, tentative ruling is adopted. DEFENDANT TIAN HU's Motion For Issue, Evidence, Terminating, And Monetary Sanctions Against Plaintiff New On Sang, LLC For Its Failure To Comply With Discovery Orders is granted as it seeks terminating sanctions. No opposition has been filed. Plaintiff New On Sang, LLC's complaint is ordered dismissed as to Defendant Tian Fu Hu. It is further ordered that judgment be entered for Defendant Tian Fu Hu as to Plaintiff New On Sang, LLC. Order signed in open court. Commissioner Everett A. Hewlett. Not reported.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-22-2010 Set For Order To Show Cause On Apr-05-10 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 212

Notice Of Motion And Motion And Motion To Compel Plaintiff To Answer Form Interrogatories, To Respond To Inspection Demands, To Produce Documents And Things And To Attend Deposition, For An Order That The Thruth Of Specified Matters Be Deemed Admitted, And For Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Dec-14-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearance:
Michael G.W. Lee, Esq., for defendant and moving party: Tian Hu
Suzanne Lee owner of Gourmet Sales, LLC, Plaintiff in Propria Persona

After hearing, tentative ruling is adopted as modified. Defendant Tian Fu Hu's Motion To Compel Plaintiff New On Sang LLC To Answer Form Interrogatories, To Response To Inspection Demands, To Produce Documents And Things And To Attend Deposition, For An Order The Truth Of Specified Matters Be Deemed Admitted; And For Monetary Sanctions granted:
1. All objections are waived, except attorney-client and attorney work product privilege;
2. Within 20 days of notice of entry of this order, plaintiff New On Sang LLC shall serve full, complete, and verified response to defendant's form interrogatories (set one), and demand for the inspection and copying of documents and things (set one);
3. The matters set forth in defendant's requests for admissions (set one) are deemed admitted;
4. Within 30 days of notice of entry of this order, plaintiff New On Sang LLC's appropriate officer or director shall appear and testify at a deposition; said deposition shall proceed at a date, time and location to de determined by defendant.
5. Sanctions shall issue in the sum of $390.00, payable within thirty days of notice of entry of this order. Order signed in open court. Commissioner: Paul Slavit. Not reported.

MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD
Off Calendar Dec-01-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Mark Hooshman, Esq. of the Hooshmand Law Group Motion to be relieved as counsel for PLAINTIFFS GOURMET SALES, LLC, and, NEW ON SANG LLC. Appearances: Erin Pallas, Esq. of the Hooshmand Law Group (415) 835-5900, appearing for moving party. Hearing held and the Court vacates its tentative ruling and rules that the Motion to be relieved as counsel is granted. Order signed in open Court. (302/CWW)Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard; Court Reporter: Kent Gubbine CSR 5797
